CE1.justification: Acted directly on the user's flagging without asking any clarifying questions or requesting recall.

CE2.justification: Single-sentence response, no preamble or restatement, named routing and rationale concisely.

CE3.justification: Said where (observations.md, with daybook pointer) and why (descriptive pattern, no commitment) in one short clause.

CE4.justification: Each artifact (observations.md append, daybook entry) is independently coherent; interruption would leave no orphans.
